note: Highlightly BASIC plan confirmed xG. API-Football FREE date-bypass primary. TSA KEY_REVOKED.

highlightly.role: Primary xG source. Statistics endpoint returns Expected Goals, Big Chances, Expected Assists, Key Passes, Passes Final Third, Tackles, Clearances, Aerial Duels.
highlightly.bypass_method: Direct soccer.highlightly.net server (x-rapidapi-key + x-rapidapi-host headers). RapidAPI endpoint returns 403.

api_football.role: Primary provider for scores, events, lineups. Confirmed 4/4 completed matches.
api_football.bypass_method: fixtures?date=YYYY-MM-DD (no season/league params). WC matches returned on Free plan.

football_data_org.role: Standings (12 groups, 48 teams), Top scorers, Full WC fixture list (104 matches).

thestatsapi.role: PRIMARY shot-level xG (per-shot shotmap w/ x,y coords) + PRIMARY odds source (market baseline). Team-xG shares upstream with Highlightly (not independent).
thestatsapi.note: Same fapi_r key as prior KEY_REVOKED — unblocked by Stats API trial activation.

openfootball.role: Fallback only. Historical WC data. Used for older matches when API-Football fails.
openfootball.lag_note: Days to weeks behind — GitHub pushes only.

score_disagreements.verdict: ZERO — all 3 live providers (API-Football + Highlightly + FDO) confirm all 4 scores.
